channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria
Description:

A Chief Engineer (Mecánico Mayor Naval) position is available on a tugboat fleet. The role is based in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. Minimum qualifications are required for this engineering role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Vacancy on Tugboat at Boluda Towage

item.description:
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria
Description:

A Mecánico Mayor Naval position is available on a tugboat fleet. The role is based in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. This is an engine department role requiring specific qualifications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Mecánico Mayor Naval Job on Tugboat at Boluda Towage

item.description:
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria
Description:

A Chief Engineer (Mecánico Mayor Naval) position is available for a tugboat fleet in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. This role requires a minimum qualification. The company is Boluda Towage. Further details on specific requirements and application process can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer (Mecánico Mayor Naval) Job - Tugboat at Boluda Towage

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electroengineer is sought for a container vessel. The joining date is July 15, 2026. The monthly salary offered is USD 6000. Further details regarding contract duration and specific requirements are available upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electroengineer Job on Container Vessel at Nordvegr Ltd

item.description:
Location: Around the world
Description:

A vacancy exists for a 2nd Engineer on a Bulk carrier vessel. The position requires experience in rank and offers a salary of 7500 USD. The trading area is worldwide, with a contract duration of 5-6 months. Joining is constant.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job on Bulk Carrier 7500 USD at OLVIA MARITIME LTD

item.description:
Location: Global
Description:

A 1st Engineer Officer is sought for a global cruise vessel position. The role involves leading engine watch-keeping, ensuring daily maintenance, and operational excellence across all engineering and technical systems. Responsibilities include managing advanced technologies like Wartsila propulsion and Azipod systems. Candidates require proven experience on passenger vessels, a valid License III/2, and intermediate English proficiency. All required maritime certifications and a valid medical fitness certificate are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 1st Engineer Job on Cruise Vessel at TSTS Group

item.description:
Location: Isle of Wight, South Coast (Portsmouth, Southampton)
Description:

Marine Engineer sought for a shore-based Junior Technical Superintendent position, involving both office duties and vessel visits for technical oversight. Candidates must have the right to work in the UK and a full UK Driver's license. Local candidates on the Isle of Wight are preferred, but those on the South Coast near Portsmouth and Southampton are also encouraged to apply if willing to commute.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Junior Technical Superintendent Job - Shore-Based at Navis Consulting

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

A Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge (SPJUB) fleet is seeking a Second Engineer with a Chief Engineer Unlimited or Second Engineer Unlimited III/2 (Home Country or UK) Certificate of Competency. Minimum 24 months of experience as Second Engineer on SPJUB is required. The rotation is 75-90 days on and 60 days off (unpaid). Joining is immediate, subject to ARAMCO PAL. Salary is to be discussed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Engineer Job - SPJUB Fleet at Aavishka Shipping Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location: Gibraltar
Description:

A 2nd Engineer is needed for a temporary position on an MPSV vessel, joining on August 11, 2026, for a 2-week contract. The daily rate is £375.75. Applicants must hold a 2nd Engineer Unlimited (UK) COC, Seafarers Medical, full STCWs, Designated Security Duties certification, and a UK Passport.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job - MPSV Vessel at Seamariner Limited

item.description:
Location: Spain
Description:

A Chief Engineer is sought for a Chemical Products Bunker Tanker operating in Spain. The position requires a minimum of 1 year of experience in the same rank on tanker vessels, an advanced Chemical Tanker Certificate, valid seafaring documents, and a very good command of English. Salary offered is 9,500 USD.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job - Chemical Tanker 9,500 USD at PAN MARINE GROUP
